title: SoftwareOperationalAnalysisBundle
description: A typed linkage envelope that binds software operational-risk scenario runs to one or more reserve/report outputs.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this bundle was assembled.

subjectRef.description: Reference to the assessed company, service, or environment.

scenarioRunRef.description: Typed scenario-run input to this analysis bundle.

reportRefs.description: One or more reserve/report outputs associated with the scenario run.

tags.description: Optional normalized tags for filtering and clustering.
